instruction: In Obsidian, list all notes in the "Projects/Planning" folder and save the note paths to "$HOME/Desktop/obsidian_projects_list_1.txt", one per line.

command:
content=$(printf '%b' '# Roadmap Draft

- align launch checklist
- confirm reviewer rotation
'); obsidian-cli create "Projects/Planning/Roadmap Draft.md" --content "$content" --overwrite --vault "Benchmark"

content=$(printf '%b' '# Risk List

- unclear owner for migration
- benchmark validation drift
'); obsidian-cli create "Projects/Planning/Risk List.md" --content "$content" --overwrite --vault "Benchmark"

reference_command: obsidian-cli list "Projects/Planning" --vault "Benchmark" | sed -E 's/^[[:space:]]*• //' | sed '/\/$/d' | sed '/^$/d' | awk '{print "Projects/Planning/" $0}' | sort > "$HOME/Desktop/obsidian_projects_list_1.txt"
